ops.title: hunk-scoped ship: design decisions + review outcomes
ops.body:
Shipped ccx vcs hunks + ship --skip-hunk/--only-hunk (plan: one-thing-needs-sparkling-pony). Durable decisions:
1. MECHANISM (user-locked): VCS-native, zero worktree mutation. jj lane = diff-editor protocol — jj commit/squash --tool ccx-ship-select with three --config flags (merge-tools program = os.Executable() TOML-quoted, edit-args TOML array invoking hidden 'vcs apply-selection --plan <json> $left $right', ui.diff-instructions=false); nonzero tool exit aborts atomically (proven: no commit op). git lane = temp index (GIT_INDEX_FILE read-tree HEAD, add -A whole files, hash-object+update-index scoped files, PATHSPEC-FREE commit — pathspec would commit worktree state — then restore --staged sync). Content-swap alternative rejected: shared-@ races (concurrent jj snapshot captures partial file; crash loses hunk in pure git).
2. REFS: file:A-B#digest; digest = anchor.OfLines over kind-marked lines ('-'+old then '+'+new — delete-X and add-X differ); digest-primary matching; duplicate digests require EXACT NewStart==ref.Line else drift refusal (nearest-wins mispicked under drift — review finding); pure deletions anchor at NewStart (NOT NewStart-1: listing/matcher off-by-one made identical deletions unaddressable and silently committed the WRONG deletion — reproduced).
3. PATHS: everything root-relative at selection entry (git rev-parse --show-toplevel / jj root, EvalSymlinks both sides — macOS /private/var vs /var broke bare filepath.Rel); git object ops are root-relative while worktree pathspecs are cwd-relative — mixing them silently committed a spurious root-level file from a subdir (reproduced). jj plan JSON keys root-relative = jj's diff-editor tree layout. ShowFileArgv jj form pins root:"<path>" fileset.
4. GUARDS: empty selection refuses BOTH pre-flight and in-tool (jj cuts an empty commit with exit 0 on an emptied right — proven); showFileBase distinguishes absent-from-base (empty base, legit new file) from VCS failure (loud error) via ls-tree --full-tree / jj file list, no stderr string-matching.
5. TESTS: live integration re-exec trick — TestMain double-gated (CCX_TEST_APPLY_SELECTION env AND os.Args[1]=='vcs') routes the TEST BINARY into NewRootCmd so jj can spawn it as the diff tool; ci.yml installs jj via taiki-e/install-action (resolves jj-cli through cargo-binstall fallback — no native manifest — pulling prebuilt release assets).
6. Deferred hardening: skip-mode fail-open on hunks appearing between listing and commit → backlog task 48d0f52.
Review: 2 lensed finders + per-finding refuters; 3 confirmed (all reproduced e2e), 4 refuted. Fragments: cc-skills 86777bab (ccx.md entry 13 + version-control.md), lock re-pinned, artifacts re-rendered.
